title: MAMR
body:
This mod adds new recipes for items that are not obtainable by crafting/smelting in vanilla minecraft! *made with mcreator*

This mod includes:

bell

leather

chainmail helmet

chainmail chestplate

chainmail leggings

chainmail boots

elytra

enchanted golden apple

leather horse armor

iron horse armor

golden horse armor

diamond horse armor

red mushroom block

brown mushroom block

mushroom stem

name tag

saddle

strings

totem of undying

trident

cobweb


overwritten recipes:

wool
